name: Tormod Dining Table Brown - Threshold™
description:
Elevate the look of your dining area with the Tormod Dining Table from Threshold™. This dining table is crafted from a wood in a rectangular shape to make it great for everyday dining. The double-pedestal base features a woven design for a textured look that blends well with your home decor. Add coordinating chairs and get ready to host loved ones on any occasion.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
